symptom_description: Phase current imbalance exceeding `22%` (`159` Amps Phase A vs normal Phase B/C). Motor running extremely rough. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from PUMP-102.
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor during peak production periods caused sustained overheating of winding copper.
action_taken: Removed motor from base plate, transported to electrical rebuild facility for complete Class H stator rewind and VPI dip.
parts_used: Complete Replacement Induction Motor 50HP, Coupling Key

symptom_description: Phase current imbalance exceeding `22%` (`154` Amps Phase A vs normal Phase B/C). Motor running extremely rough.
root_cause: Contamination of stator coils with airborne conductive dust and moisture due to missing terminal box gasket.
action_taken: Swapped out failed motor with certified warehouse spare unit; sent damaged stator for rewind and core loss testing.
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set

symptom_description: Loud persistent whining and thumping sound emanating from motor non-drive end bearing during operation. Field diagnostics indicate misalignment at shaft coupling connecting directly to PUMP-102.
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear of deep groove ball bearings after exceeding 40,000 hours of continuous operating life.
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings, installed shaft grounding ring to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit.
parts_used: DE Ball Bearing, NDE Insulated Bearing, AEGIS Shaft Grounding Ring Kit

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing with `minor` harmonics. Maintenance triggered after unusual process flow/pressure drop noted on primary process unit PUMP-102.
root_cause: Grease dry-out and thermal degradation due to operating in elevated ambient temperature environment (`> 40°C`).
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings, installed shaft grounding ring to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit.
parts_used: SKF 6312-C3 Drive-End Bearing, SKF 6310-C3 NDE Bearing, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Ops reported strong heat waves radiating from motor frame and `concerning` drop in operating speed (`RPM`).
root_cause: External cooling fins heavily caked with thick industrial dust and grease, reducing convective heat transfer by `> 60%`.
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage and deep cleaned motor heat sink fins.
parts_used: Auxiliary Forced-Air Blower Kit 460V, Fan Shroud Mounting Brackets

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after 3 hours of continuous running. Cooling fan shroud feels gradual hot to the touch.
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 20 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling.
action_taken: Cleared blockage from cooling fan intake grid, washed frame fins, and verified balanced supply voltage (`460V` +/- 1%).

symptom_description: Main breaker tripped instantly upon energization. Stator surge comparison test confirmed turn-to-turn short in phase coil.
root_cause: Contamination of stator coils with airborne conductive dust and moisture due to missing terminal box gasket.
action_taken: Removed motor from base plate, transported to electrical rebuild facility for complete Class H stator rewind and VPI dip.
parts_used: Class H Stator Rewind Service, Motor Lead Lug Kit, Terminal Box Gasket

symptom_description: Loud abnormal whining and screeching sound emanating from motor non-drive end bearing during operation. Inspected power and control interconnects running to PUMP-102 during diagnostic routine.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents) from VFD drive caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: De-coupled motor, removed bearing end shields, replaced both DE and NDE bearings with C3 clearance ball bearings, and packed with Polyrex EM.
parts_used: DE Ball Bearing, NDE Insulated Bearing, AEGIS Shaft Grounding Ring Kit

symptom_description: Phase current imbalance exceeding `22%` (`130` Amps Phase A vs normal Phase B/C). Motor running extremely rough.
root_cause: Age-related thermal brittleness of Class F winding insulation accelerated by frequent motor start/stop cycles.
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement, renewed lead lugs, and verified balance and alignment with driven load.
parts_used: Stator Rewind Kit, VFD Output Line Reactor, Terminal Gasket

symptom_description: Tech noted intermittent grease discoloration leaking from bearing grease relief tube and metallic clattering.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents) from VFD drive caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings, installed shaft grounding ring to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit.
parts_used: SKF 6312-C3 Drive-End Bearing, SKF 6310-C3 NDE Bearing, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after 3 hours of continuous running. Cooling fan shroud feels persistent hot to the touch.
root_cause: External cooling fins heavily caked with thick industrial dust and grease, reducing convective heat transfer by `> 60%`.
action_taken: De-energized motor, removed fan cover, and thoroughly cleaned cooling fins and fan blades using dry compressed air and degreaser.
parts_used: Auxiliary Forced-Air Blower Kit 460V, Fan Shroud Mounting Brackets

symptom_description: Motor drive-end bearing housing temperature reaching `111`°C. High frequency acoustic vibration (`0.26` in/sec RMS) detected.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents) from VFD drive caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Disassembled motor, installed insulated NDE bearing and standard DE bearing, and verified smooth running signatures.
parts_used: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing Set, Grease Valve Kit

symptom_description: Stator RTD temperature alarm active. Motor drawing `136` Amps (`98%` FLA) with unusual thermal buildup on frame.
root_cause: External cooling fan cover grid clogged with lint and debris, blocking cooling airflow across motor frame.
action_taken: Installed auxiliary cooling blower unit for low-speed VFD operation and cleaned existing motor frame cooling channels.

symptom_description: Loud persistent whining and thumping sound emanating from motor non-drive end bearing during operation. High load demand from driven equipment (PUMP-102) suspected of accelerating component wear.
root_cause: Shaft voltage discharge (EDM currents) from VFD drive caused fluting and micro-pitting on bearing raceways.
action_taken: Replaced worn bearing set, cleaned grease cavities, installed new grease relief valves, and balanced rotor assembly.
parts_used: SKF 6312-C3 Drive-End Bearing, SKF 6310-C3 NDE Bearing, Polyrex EM Grease (1 Tube)

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `75`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `145°C` alarm limit.
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 20 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling.
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage and deep cleaned motor heat sink fins.
parts_used: Auxiliary Forced-Air Blower Kit 460V, Fan Shroud Mounting Brackets
